STRICTLY PRIVATE & CONFIDENTIAL — INSIDE INFORMATION (SCA/ADGM MAR) — Embargo until 20 Jul 2026 08:30 GST
Al Sarab Logistics PJSC (ADX: ALSP) — Cyber/Operational Incident & Deal-Readiness Update re Project Star Oasis
Incident summary: on 18 Jul 2026 23:41 GST our ADGM-hosted VDR for Project Star Oasis (12.5% sell-down) faced credential-stuffing; non public deal folders were quarantined read-only
Impacted systems/URLs: https://dataroom.star-oasis.internal/login?deal=SO-12%25&ts=2026-07-18T23:41Z; ADGM SPV "Star Oasis Holdings Ltd" share registry view only; no payments
Potential data exposure under UAE PDPL: limited to masked Emirates ID tags (e.g., EID: 784-0000-0000000-0) and trade licence refs (TL: CN-1O3A-7Z5; OCR drift), no biometric or family-origin data
Board context: Definitive Share Purchase Agreement (defini-
tive SPA) for sale of 12.5% of Desert Dhow Warehousing LLC to our ADGM SPV priced at AED 237,000,000 is fully negotiated pending sign/announce
Covenant assessment: outage temporary; under SPA clause 7.2 (MAC/MAE) the Parties agree the incident does not constitute a MAE, and no MAC has occurred as of 19 Jul 2026
Regulatory: SCA Market Conduct and ADX Listing Rules may require disclosure if effects persist >72h; however public-source references indicate ADX calendar maintenance 18–19 Jul is unrelated
Personal data handling: Mr. Tariq Al Mahri (CISO) and Ms. Hana Qasimi (Data Protection Officer) reviewed logs; PDPL notification trigger not met; sample contact obfuscation applied to "EID: 784-••••-•••••••-•"
Contact: csirt@alsarab-logistics.ae; +971-5X-XXX-XXXX; backup: IR team at ir@alsarab-logistics.ae for embargoed investor-relations drafts
Containment/next steps: reset federated SSO to D I F C standards, rotate ADGM API keys, and retest upload of board memos and term sheets; to-do: send draft to legal and adgm ops monday
Deal checklist items affected: board memo v5, IR draft release (embargoed), term sheet annexure B, signatory grid; non public tags retained; wet-ink signatures not yet collected
Public website and wellness benefits (spa day at Palm Mirage) are unaffected; product names, marketing assets, and cafeteria menus are not inside information
Counterparty status: Nile Star Capital FZ-LLC confirmed readiness to sign by 21 Jul 2026; the defini-
tive agreement will be executed in Abu Dhabi, with ADGM courts as forum; long-stop date 31 Aug 2026; ADX announce text held draft-only
Confirmation by H.E. Dr. Leila Saqqaf (Chair) that management may proceed to sign if conditions precedent are satisfied and no sanction hits occur; embargo remains until 20 Jul 2026 08:30 GST
Audit trail refs: change ticket a dx/ops/2441; SIEM alert ID 00A-9Z-7l; deal room "SO/SPA/DRAFT"; see research note v3 re supply chain metrics (public ADX benchmark used)
